markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review partnership progress and align on content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/EgMHN9sL8TBsFW6nTuByWGR5z3hs6chk?tab=summary&timestamp=126.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Content Quality:** Initial drafts require heavy PMM review due to misaligned positioning and outdated competitive info. The solution is to integrate Cresta's specific POV via deep-dive artifacts.](https://fathom.video/share/EgMHN9sL8TBsFW6nTuByWGR5z3hs6chk?tab=summary&timestamp=157.0)
  - [**Design Mismatch:** Recent article images are off-brand (e.g., generic headsets), ignoring prior guidance. Bailey will investigate the communication breakdown and correct the creative direction.](https://fathom.video/share/EgMHN9sL8TBsFW6nTuByWGR5z3hs6chk?tab=summary&timestamp=506.0)
  - [**Strong Early Performance:** January metrics are healthy, with high engagement (80% for LLM traffic) and rapid AI visibility growth (5.7%), indicating strong traction.](https://fathom.video/share/EgMHN9sL8TBsFW6nTuByWGR5z3hs6chk?tab=summary&timestamp=1541.0)
  - [**New Tools:** A simplified Airtable interface will streamline topic prioritization. Cresta will also get early access to the new "Check That" competitive tracking tool this week.](https://fathom.video/share/EgMHN9sL8TBsFW6nTuByWGR5z3hs6chk?tab=summary&timestamp=988.0)

## Topics

### Content Quality & Review Burden

  - [Initial drafts require heavy PMM review, increasing review cycles.](https://fathom.video/share/EgMHN9sL8TBsFW6nTuByWGR5z3hs6chk?tab=summary&timestamp=157.0)
      - [**Root Cause:** The AI research agent relies on generic info instead of Cresta's specific POV.](https://fathom.video/share/EgMHN9sL8TBsFW6nTuByWGR5z3hs6chk?tab=summary&timestamp=255.0)
      - [**Examples:**](https://fathom.video/share/EgMHN9sL8TBsFW6nTuByWGR5z3hs6chk?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
          - [**QM Article:** Fundamentally misaligned.](https://fathom.video/share/EgMHN9sL8TBsFW6nTuByWGR5z3hs6chk?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
          - [**Competitive Articles:** Missing nuance and outdated info (e.g., framing Sierra as missing a feature they launched 3 months ago).](https://fathom.video/share/EgMHN9sL8TBsFW6nTuByWGR5z3hs6chk?tab=summary&timestamp=296.0)
          - [**Market Framing:** Incorrectly comparing Cresta to CCaaS platforms instead of specialized leaders.](https://fathom.video/share/EgMHN9sL8TBsFW6nTuByWGR5z3hs6chk?tab=summary&timestamp=373.0)
  - [**Solution:** Integrate Cresta's specific methodology and POV via deep-dive artifacts (e.g., for QM, coaching, insights).](https://fathom.video/share/EgMHN9sL8TBsFW6nTuByWGR5z3hs6chk?tab=summary&timestamp=255.0)

### Design Mismatch

  - [Recent article images are off-brand, using generic stock photos (e.g., people with headsets) instead of the creative direction established with Steve (Cresta's design lead).](https://fathom.video/share/EgMHN9sL8TBsFW6nTuByWGR5z3hs6chk?tab=summary&timestamp=506.0)
  - [**Action:** Bailey will investigate the communication breakdown and redirect the GrowthX design team to align with Cresta's blog as the "good looks like" reference.](https://fathom.video/share/EgMHN9sL8TBsFW6nTuByWGR5z3hs6chk?tab=summary&timestamp=728.0)

### Programmatic SEO Strategy

  - [Russell proposed a programmatic SEO initiative (e.g., a glossary, company database) to build a scalable content asset.](https://fathom.video/share/EgMHN9sL8TBsFW6nTuByWGR5z3hs6chk?tab=summary&timestamp=555.0)
  - [**Action:** Bailey will have the GrowthX strategy team scope potential opportunities and present a recommendation.](https://fathom.video/share/EgMHN9sL8TBsFW6nTuByWGR5z3hs6chk?tab=summary&timestamp=612.0)

### Topic Prioritization & Process

  - [**Process:** A new Airtable interface will streamline topic prioritization with simple "approve/reject" checkboxes and comment fields.](https://fathom.video/share/EgMHN9sL8TBsFW6nTuByWGR5z3hs6chk?tab=summary&timestamp=988.0)
  - [**Challenge:** Some topics are in "Approved to Start" without a priority.](https://fathom.video/share/EgMHN9sL8TBsFW6nTuByWGR5z3hs6chk?tab=summary&timestamp=1031.0)
      - [**Action:** Devon will prioritize these topics using the new interface.](https://fathom.video/share/EgMHN9sL8TBsFW6nTuByWGR5z3hs6chk?tab=summary&timestamp=1117.0)
  - [**Guidance:** Bailey clarified how to balance SEO factors:](https://fathom.video/share/EgMHN9sL8TBsFW6nTuByWGR5z3hs6chk?tab=summary&timestamp=1145.0)
      - [**High Volume/High Difficulty:** Pursue for high-value keywords, but balance with easier topics to ensure consistent ranking progress.](https://fathom.video/share/EgMHN9sL8TBsFW6nTuByWGR5z3hs6chk?tab=summary&timestamp=1211.0)
      - [**AEO (AI Search):**](https://fathom.video/share/EgMHN9sL8TBsFW6nTuByWGR5z3hs6chk?tab=summary&timestamp=1309.0)
          - [Prioritize low-volume, high-intent long-tail keywords.](https://fathom.video/share/EgMHN9sL8TBsFW6nTuByWGR5z3hs6chk?tab=summary&timestamp=1309.0)
          - [Focus on listicles and comparison articles, which are highly cited by LLMs.](https://fathom.video/share/EgMHN9sL8TBsFW6nTuByWGR5z3hs6chk?tab=summary&timestamp=1395.0)
          - [Ensure Cresta brand mentions are in the "chunks" of content LLMs use for citations.](https://fathom.video/share/EgMHN9sL8TBsFW6nTuByWGR5z3hs6chk?tab=summary&timestamp=1432.0)

### January Performance Review

  - [Performance is healthy, showing strong early traction.](https://fathom.video/share/EgMHN9sL8TBsFW6nTuByWGR5z3hs6chk?tab=summary&timestamp=1541.0)
      - [**Traffic:** Growing on a positive curve.](https://fathom.video/share/EgMHN9sL8TBsFW6nTuByWGR5z3hs6chk?tab=summary&timestamp=1541.0)
      - [**Engagement:** High rates, signaling content resonance (80% for LLM traffic).](https://fathom.video/share/EgMHN9sL8TBsFW6nTuByWGR5z3hs6chk?tab=summary&timestamp=1584.0)
      - [**Keyword Rankings:** Improving average position.](https://fathom.video/share/EgMHN9sL8TBsFW6nTuByWGR5z3hs6chk?tab=summary&timestamp=1596.0)
      - [**AI Visibility:** 5.7% and growing, with rapid citation by LLMs.](https://fathom.video/share/EgMHN9sL8TBsFW6nTuByWGR5z3hs6chk?tab=summary&timestamp=1616.0)
  - [**Competitive Tracking:** Cresta ranks 11th out of 30 tracked competitors.](https://fathom.video/share/EgMHN9sL8TBsFW6nTuByWGR5z3hs6chk?tab=summary&timestamp=1727.0)
      - [**Action:** Bailey will provide the competitor list. Devon will use it to inform content strategy and track progress.](https://fathom.video/share/EgMHN9sL8TBsFW6nTuByWGR5z3hs6chk?tab=summary&timestamp=1746.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Devon:**](https://fathom.video/share/EgMHN9sL8TBsFW6nTuByWGR5z3hs6chk?tab=summary&timestamp=1145.0)
      - [Provide PMM review time benchmarks to Bailey.](https://fathom.video/share/EgMHN9sL8TBsFW6nTuByWGR5z3hs6chk?tab=summary&timestamp=208.0)
      - [Prioritize topics in the new Airtable interface.](https://fathom.video/share/EgMHN9sL8TBsFW6nTuByWGR5z3hs6chk?tab=summary&timestamp=1117.0)
  - [**Bailey:**](https://fathom.video/share/EgMHN9sL8TBsFW6nTuByWGR5z3hs6chk?tab=summary&timestamp=413.0)
      - [Create a competitive positioning matrix from Cresta's battle cards.](https://fathom.video/share/EgMHN9sL8TBsFW6nTuByWGR5z3hs6chk?tab=summary&timestamp=413.0)
      - [Investigate the design process breakdown and correct creative direction.](https://fathom.video/share/EgMHN9sL8TBsFW6nTuByWGR5z3hs6chk?tab=summary&timestamp=728.0)
      - [Have the GrowthX strategy team scope programmatic SEO opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/EgMHN9sL8TBsFW6nTuByWGR5z3hs6chk?tab=summary&timestamp=612.0)
      - [Provide the list of 30 tracked competitors.](https://fathom.video/share/EgMHN9sL8TBsFW6nTuByWGR5z3hs6chk?tab=summary&timestamp=1746.0)
      - [Follow up on "Check That" tool access (Loom walkthrough this week, logins soon).](https://fathom.video/share/EgMHN9sL8TBsFW6nTuByWGR5z3hs6chk?tab=summary&timestamp=1509.0)
  - [**All:**](https://fathom.video/share/EgMHN9sL8TBsFW6nTuByWGR5z3hs6chk?tab=summary&timestamp=1825.0)
      - [Focus next week's meeting on a "Check That" tool walkthrough and competitive prompt review.](https://fathom.video/share/EgMHN9sL8TBsFW6nTuByWGR5z3hs6chk?tab=summary&timestamp=1825.0)
